description: English syllable-level alignment with weak-unit merging. Weak function words may be merged into neighboring syllable groups when raw syllable count exceeds note count.

phrases.zh: 感受停在我发端的指尖
phrases.text: Feel the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair

phrases.zh: 如何瞬间冻结时间
phrases.text: How to instantly freeze time

phrases.zh: 记住望着我坚定的双眼
phrases.text: Remember determined eyes gazing at me

phrases.zh: 也许已经没有明天
phrases.text: Perhaps there's no tomorrow left

phrases.zh: 面对浩瀚的星海我们微小得像尘埃
phrases.text: Facing the vast sea of stars we're as tiny as dust

phrases.zh: 漂浮在一片无奈
phrases.text: Floating in a sea of helplessness

phrases.zh: 缘份让我们相遇乱世以外
phrases.text: Fate brought us together outside the chaotic world

phrases.zh: 命运却要我们危难中相爱
phrases.text: we fall in love amidst peril

phrases.zh: 也许未来遥远在光年之外
phrases.text: Perhaps the future lies far beyond light years away

phrases.zh: 我愿守候未知里为你等待
phrases.text: willing to wait for you in unknown

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到山崩海啸
phrases.text: I never expected I go so mad for you mountains

phrases.zh: 没有你根本不想逃我的大脑
phrases.text: Without you my mind refuses to flee

phrases.zh: 为了你已经疯狂到脉搏心跳没有你
phrases.text: For you I've gone so crazy that without you my pulse and heartbeat

phrases.zh: 根本不重要
phrases.text: simply don't matter at all

phrases.zh: 一双围在我胸口的臂弯
phrases.text: pair of arms wrapped around my chest

phrases.zh: 足够抵挡天旋地转
phrases.text: is enough to withstand dizzying spin

phrases.zh: 一种执迷不放手的倔强足以
phrases.text: stubborn obsession of refusing to let go enough

phrases.zh: 点燃所有希望
phrases.text: ignite all hope

phrases.zh: 宇宙磅礡而冷漠我们的爱微小却闪烁
phrases.text: universe vast indifferent our love tiny yet shimmering

phrases.zh: 颠簸却如此忘我
phrases.text: turbulent yet so utterly absorbed

phrases.zh: 缘分让我们相遇乱世以外
phrases.text: Destiny brought us together outside chaotic world

phrases.zh: 命运却要我们危难中相爱
phrases.text: we fall in love amidst danger

phrases.zh: 也许未来遥远在光年之外
phrases.text: Perhaps the future lies far away beyond light years

phrases.zh: 我愿守候未知里为你等待
phrases.text: willing to wait for you in unknown

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到
phrases.text: I never expected for you I go so crazy

phrases.zh: 山崩海啸没有你根本不想逃
phrases.text: Mountains without you I want to flee

phrases.zh: 我的大脑为了你已经疯狂到
phrases.text: My mind for you has already gone so crazy

phrases.zh: 脉搏心跳没有你根本不重
phrases.text: Pulse heartbeat without you simply aren't important

phrases.zh: 要也许航道以外
phrases.text: Perhaps beyond the course

phrases.zh: 是醒不来的梦乱世
phrases.text: dream I can't wake from in chaotic world

phrases.zh: 以外是纯粹的相拥
phrases.text: Outside is a pure embrace

phrases.zh: 我没想到为了你我能疯狂到山崩海啸
phrases.text: I for you I as to see mountains crumble seas rage

phrases.zh: 没有你根本不想逃我的大脑为了你已经疯狂
phrases.text: Without you I don't even want to flee my mind for you has gone crazy

phrases.zh: 到脉搏心跳没有你根本不重要
phrases.text: To point where pulse heartbeat without you simply don't matter

phrases.zh: 相遇乱世以外
phrases.text: Meeting outside world

phrases.zh: 危难中相爱相遇
phrases.text: Falling in love and meeting amidst peril

phrases.zh: 乱世以外危难中
phrases.text: Outside chaotic times amidst danger

phrases.zh: 相爱我没想到
phrases.text: I never expected us to love each other
